## Description

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `gofumpt -w .` run
- [ ] `go vet ./...` passes
- [ ] `golangci-lint run` passes
- [ ] `go test ./... -race -shuffle=on` passes
- [ ] `go mod tidy` run
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated
